title: Washer Rotor Hub Assembly, MBF618448 PBT-GF30 Washer Rotor Hub Replacement Parts for Compatible with LG Washing Machine
features: [Material]: The washer rotor hub is made of high quality material, good performance, wear resistant, not easy to break or deform, sturdy and durable

[Good Performance]: This rotor hub assembly replacement interacts with the stator to generate a strong electromagnetic field, causing the tub to rotate in any direction. MBF618448 washer rotor hub need to be replaced in following symptoms: will not spin; will not agitate, etc

[Replacement Part Number]: Direct replacement for 4413ER1002A, 4413ER1001C, 4413EA1002B, 4413ER1002F, 4413ER1003A, 4413ER1003B, AHL72914401 (AP5198106), AGF78384401, AH3532774, EA3532774, PS3532774, etc

[Wide Application]: Compatible with LG and Kenmore washers. Compatible models : M2050CW, WM2677HWM, WM2487HWMA, WM2501HWA, WM0642HW, WM2801HLA, WM2301HR, WM2301HW, WD12430RDG, WM2496HWM, WM2688HNMA, WD12520BDM, WD12526BDM, WM2701HV, WD13513BDA, WM2501HVA, F1355FDS5, WM2901HVA, WD12433BDA and more
[Package]: The package includes 1 pcs PBT-GF30 washer rotor hub
description: Feature: 【Rubber Material】This washing machine rotor hub is made of rubber material with good elasticity. It can effectively absorb and disperse the vibration when the washing machine is running at high speed, reduce the noise and improve the running stability. 【Strong Fatigue Resistance】This washer rotor hub assembly is fatigue-resistant, and even when working at high speeds for a long time, it is not easy to be deformed or cracked, which prolongs the service life of the hub. It can reduce the friction loss with the motor shaft or other parts, keep smooth operation for a long time and reduce the maintenance needs. 【Replace Number】Washer rotor hub MBF618448 is compatible with L-G Ken-more washers (Ori-ginal version), direct replacement for 4413ER1002A, 4413ER1001C, 4413EA1002B, 4413ER1002F, 4413ER1003A, 4413ER1003B, AHL72914401 (AP5198106), AGF78384401, AH3532774, EA3532774, PS3532774, etc. 【Compatible Models】Compatible with LG and Kenmore washers. Compatible models : M2050CW, WM2677HWM, WM2487HWMA, WM2501HWA, WM0642HW, WM2801HLA, WM2301HR, WM2301HW, WD12430RDG, WM2496HWM, WM2688HNMA, WD12520BDM, WD12526BDM, WM2701HV, WD13513BDA, WM2501HVA, F1355FDS5, WM2901HVA, WD12433BDA and more. 【Replacement Part】If your washer is experiencing problems such as not agitating or spinning water, this rotor hub can solve those problems. Before installing this washing machine rotor hub assembly PBT-GF30, be sure to disconnect all power sources and wear gloves to protect your hands. Specification: Name: Washer Rotor Hub Number: MBF618448 Material: Rubber Size: As Shown Fitment: Compatible With LG/Kenmore Washing Machine Package Included: 1 * Washer Rotor Hub
